title: Darcy Battery Management System
subtitle: Four-layer battery management and power-distribution board for Darcy avionics
stackup: Four copper-layer battery management PCB exported from Altium Gerbers
summary: Battery management PCB for the Darcy rocket, acting as the primary power-distribution node from a 12-cell lithium-ion pack to vehicle avionics. The design includes regulated power, five load-switch paths, current and voltage telemetry, connector load-switch circuitry, and current-loop sensor interfacing.
mainConstraints: Deliver protected power from the battery pack to avionics subsystems
Keep the five load-switch paths consistent, reviewable, and bring-up friendly
Route current and voltage telemetry cleanly for ADC-based validation
Maintain effective grounding and low-EMI power distribution in a compact four-layer PCB
publicNote: This project is derived from exported Altium schematic and Gerber artifacts. Raw .SchDoc and .PcbDoc files are not parsed by this portfolio.

model3d.title: Darcy BMS 3D Model
model3d.description: Interactive 3D board model from the Altium STEP export.

pages.title: Exported Schematic PDF
pages.description: Exported Altium schematic PDF dated 3/18/2026, revision 2.1. The PDF covers top level, primary sheet, power, load switching, ADC measurement, connector load switches, and current-loop sensor interfacing.
